200.html:
data [required]

[object]

List of devices matching the request.

attributes

object

Common health and identity attributes shared by every End User Device Monitoring device record.

agent_key

string

Public key of the Datadog Agent installed on the device.

agent_version

string

Version of the Datadog Agent installed on the device.

battery_max_capacity_pct

int64

Maximum battery capacity expressed as a percentage of the device's design capacity.

cpu_cores

int64

Number of physical CPU cores on the device.

cpu_logical_processors

int64

Number of logical CPU processors (hardware threads) on the device.

cpu_model

string

Human-readable name of the device's CPU model.

cpu_usage

double

Average CPU usage on the device, as a percentage between 0 and 100.

disk_usage

double

Average disk usage on the device, as a percentage between 0 and 100.

ip_address

string

Last observed IPv4 or IPv6 address of the device.

issues

[string]

List of issue identifiers currently affecting the device. References entries returned by the issues endpoint.

kernel_name

string

Name of the operating system kernel running on the device.

last_seen

string

Timestamp of the most recent telemetry received from the device, in RFC 3339 format.

manufacturer

string

Manufacturer of the device.

mem_usage

double

Average memory usage on the device, as a percentage between 0 and 100.

memory_total_kb

int64

Total amount of physical memory available on the device, in kilobytes.

model_name

string

Marketing or product name of the device model.

model_number

string

Manufacturer-assigned model number of the device.

os

string

Operating system family running on the device (for example, mac, windows, or linux).

os_version

string

Operating system version running on the device.

resource_id

string

Datadog resource identifier for the device.

serial_number

string

Serial number assigned to the device by its manufacturer.

status

string

Health status of the device computed from its issues and recent telemetry.

type

string

Hardware type of the device (for example, laptop, desktop, or mobile).

uptime

double

Time elapsed since the device last booted, in seconds.

wlan_bssid

string

BSSID (MAC address of the access point) of the wireless network the device is currently connected to.

wlan_rssi

double

Received signal strength indicator of the device's current wireless connection, in dBm.

wlan_ssid

string

SSID of the wireless network the device is currently connected to.

id [required]

string

Unique identifier of the device. Matches the Datadog host identifier.

type [required]

enum

Devices resource type. Allowed enum values: devices

default: devices

429.html:
errors [required]

[string]

A list of errors.

200.html:
data

object

A single device entry with full attribute detail.

attributes

object

Extended set of attributes for a single End User Device Monitoring device, including detailed network and battery metrics.

agent_key

string

Public key of the Datadog Agent installed on the device.

agent_version

string

Version of the Datadog Agent installed on the device.

battery_charge_pct

int64

Current battery charge level as a percentage between 0 and 100.

battery_charge_rate

int64

Rate at which the battery is charging or discharging, in milliamperes. Negative values indicate discharge.

battery_cycle_count

int64

Number of full charge cycles the battery has gone through.

battery_max_capacity_pct

int64

Maximum battery capacity expressed as a percentage of the device's design capacity.

cpu_cores

int64

Number of physical CPU cores on the device.

cpu_logical_processors

int64

Number of logical CPU processors (hardware threads) on the device.

cpu_model

string

Human-readable name of the device's CPU model.

cpu_usage

double

Average CPU usage on the device, as a percentage between 0 and 100.

disk_usage

double

Average disk usage on the device, as a percentage between 0 and 100.

ip_address

string

Last observed IPv4 or IPv6 address of the device.

issues

[string]

List of issue identifiers currently affecting the device. References entries returned by the issues endpoint.

kernel_name

string

Name of the operating system kernel running on the device.

last_seen

string

Timestamp of the most recent telemetry received from the device, in RFC 3339 format.

manufacturer

string

Manufacturer of the device.

mem_usage

double

Average memory usage on the device, as a percentage between 0 and 100.

memory_total_kb

int64

Total amount of physical memory available on the device, in kilobytes.

model_name

string

Marketing or product name of the device model.

model_number

string

Manufacturer-assigned model number of the device.

os

string

Operating system family running on the device (for example, mac, windows, or linux).

os_version

string

Operating system version running on the device.

packets_in_drop

double

Average rate of dropped inbound network packets, in packets per second.

packets_in_error

double

Average rate of inbound network packets received with errors, in packets per second.

packets_out_drop

double

Average rate of dropped outbound network packets, in packets per second.

packets_out_error

double

Average rate of outbound network packets sent with errors, in packets per second.

resource_id

string

Datadog resource identifier for the device.

serial_number

string

Serial number assigned to the device by its manufacturer.

status

string

Health status of the device computed from its issues and recent telemetry.

tcp_out_segs

double

Average rate of TCP segments sent by the device, in segments per second.

tcp_retrans_segs

double

Average rate of TCP segments retransmitted by the device, in segments per second.

type

string

Hardware type of the device (for example, laptop, desktop, or mobile).

uptime

double

Time elapsed since the device last booted, in seconds.

wlan_bssid

string

BSSID (MAC address of the access point) of the wireless network the device is currently connected to.

wlan_rssi

double

Received signal strength indicator of the device's current wireless connection, in dBm.

wlan_ssid

string

SSID of the wireless network the device is currently connected to.

id [required]

string

Unique identifier of the device. Matches the Datadog host identifier.

type [required]

enum

Devices resource type. Allowed enum values: devices

default: devices

404.html:
errors [required]

[object]

A list of errors.

detail

string

A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence of the error.

meta

object

Non-standard meta-information about the error

source

object

References to the source of the error.

header

string

A string indicating the name of a single request header which caused the error.

parameter

string

A string indicating which URI query parameter caused the error.

pointer

string

A JSON pointer to the value in the request document that caused the error.

status

string

Status code of the response.

title

string

Short human-readable summary of the error.

429.html:
errors [required]

[string]

A list of errors.

200.html:
data [required]

[object]

List of grouping entries with their associated device counts.

attributes

object

Attributes of a single grouping in the End User Device Monitoring graph response.

counts

[object]

List of per-value counts for the grouping column.

columnName

string

Value of the grouping column for this bucket (for example, an operating system name or a device type).

count

int64

Number of devices that fall into this bucket.

type

string

Identifier of the grouping column (for example, os or type).

id [required]

string

Unique identifier of the grouping, derived from the grouping column.

type [required]

enum

Graph items resource type. Allowed enum values: graph_items

default: graph_items

429.html:
errors [required]

[string]

A list of errors.

200.html:
data [required]

[object]

List of available issue definitions.

attributes

object

Attributes of a single End User Device Monitoring issue definition.

category [required]

string

Category of the issue (for example, battery, network, or performance).

label [required]

string

Human-readable label describing the issue, suitable for display in the Datadog UI.

level [required]

string

Severity level of the issue (for example, warning or critical).

id [required]

string

Stable identifier of the issue definition, used in the issues field of a device record.

type [required]

enum

Issue definitions resource type. Allowed enum values: issue_definitions

default: issue_definitions

429.html:
errors [required]

[string]

A list of errors.

200.html:
data [required]

[object]

List of overview tiles.

attributes

object

Attributes of a single tile in the End User Device Monitoring overview dashboard.

name

string

Human-readable name of the overview tile.

value

int64

Numeric value displayed on the overview tile.

id [required]

string

Unique identifier of the overview tile.

type [required]

enum

Overview items resource type. Allowed enum values: overview_items

default: overview_items

429.html:
errors [required]

[string]

A list of errors.
